title: A Day in the Life - Terminal Agent Flow

data.title: A Day in the Life
data.subtitle: What used to take 45+ minutes now starts with one terminal prompt.

lines.text: start my day
◐ The user wants me to invoke the "morning-brief" skill. Let me do that immediately.
● skill(morning-brief)
◐ The morning-brief skill is now loaded. I will follow Phase 1 - Parallel Medium Probe.
1. Vault: oil:get_vault_context()
2. CRM: msx:crm_auth_status
3. WorkIQ: check EULA accepted
● Starting your morning brief — launching parallel medium probes now.
◐ Probe results: Vault connected, CRM authenticated, WorkIQ ready.
◐ Correlating notes + deals + meetings + signal threads...
✅ Context-aware morning brief generated.
prep me for the contoso call
● Running meeting-prep(agent: Contoso)
◐ Pulling account context, recent emails, and milestone status...
◐ Building talk track with open risks and exec asks.
✅ Meeting brief ready: goals, objections, next best actions.
any crm hygiene i can fix right now?
● Running quick-wins(hygiene-scan)
◐ Scanning stale milestones, missing tasks, and date drift...
◐ Found 7 fixes safe to apply with approval.
✅ 7 quick wins applied in 5 minutes.
run my weekly pipeline review
● Running pipeline-review(full-hygiene-sweep)
◐ Checking risk flags, commitment gates, and owner coverage...
◐ Creating shareable summary for deal desk and leadership.
✅ Pipeline review posted with prioritized follow-ups.
close the poc task on contoso ai milestone
● Running update-crm(task: Contoso AI PoC)
◐ Showing diff: status, owner notes, completion date.
◐ Awaiting your approval to write back to CRM.
✅ Approved. Update committed and timeline synced.

data.tagline: Simple prompting. Context-aware execution. Repeatable every day.
